meta.title: Postoperative Glioma-Related Epilepsy (PGREM) — risk of remote symptomatic seizures
meta.cff_info:
Postoperative Glioma-related Epilepsy Model

Li et al., 2023

DOI: 10.1186/s12885-022-10385-x

Factors and Points

  • Age:
    • 0 points: Age ≥65 years
    • 1 point: Age 50-64 years
    • 2 points: Age 30-49 years
    • 3 points: Age ≤29 years
  • Temporal Lobe Involvement:
    • 0 points: Non-involved
    • 1.5 points: Involved
  • Preoperative GRE (Glioma-Related Epilepsy):
    • 0 points: Non-GRE
    • 1 point: GRE present
  • Predictive Genes:
    • LUZP2, GPNMB, MMD2, GALNT13, IKBKGP1, SLC1A4, RP1
    • Risk Score Calculation Formula: Risk score = 0.000646822 * ExpLUZP2 + 0.002348291 * ExpGPNMB + 0.003071414 * ExpMMD2 + 0.005716866 * ExpGALNT13 + 0.014817826 * ExpIKBKGP1 + 0.01969116 * ExpSLC1A4 + 0.019902233 * ExpRP1

Risk Estimates

Predicted risk of epilepsy after 2 years based on the score:

Score Risk
0 points ~0%
1 point ~0%
2 points ~1%
3 points ~2%
4 points ~4%
5 points ~6%
6 points ~11%
7 points ~22%
8 points ~35%
9 points ~53%
10 points ~69%
11 points ~83%
12 points ~91%
13 points ~95%

Additional Study Information

Category Details
Population Derivation: 166 patients. Validation: 42 patients (Beijing Tiantan Hospital).
Statistical Methods LASSO logistic regression, multivariate logistic regression.
Performance Metrics AUC: 0.878 (training), 0.845 (validation).
Generalizability Moderate (single-center study).
Clinical Utility Combines gene-signature and clinical data; identifies high-risk patients. Nomogram is complex but effective.
meta.authors: Li L, Zhang C, Wang Z, et al.
meta.clinical_utility: Background This study aimed to develop an integrated model for predicting the occurrence of postoperative seizures in patients with diffuse high-grade gliomas (DHGGs) using clinical and RNA-seq data. Methods Patients with DHGGs, who received prophylactic anti-epileptic drugs (AEDs) for three months following surgery, were enrolled into the study.
meta.outcome: Development of an integrated predictive model for postoperative glioma-related epilepsy using gene-signature and clinical data

predictors.name: Age
predictors.assess: Younger age correlates with higher seizure risk postoperatively.

predictors.name: Temporal Lobe Involvement
predictors.assess: Temporal lobe involvement significantly increases seizure risk.

predictors.name: Preoperative Glioma-Related Epilepsy (GRE)
predictors.assess: Documented epileptic seizures prior to surgery.

predictors.name: Expression level of LUZP2
predictors.assess: Optional. Normalised gene-expression level; leave at 0 if not measured. Contributes coef × exp(value) to the combined score (the gene signature).

model.panel_title: Risk of remote symptomatic seizures at 2 years
model.note: Combined score = age + temporal-lobe (1.5) + preoperative GRE (1) + gene signature (Σ coef·exp(expression)); mapped to the published 2-year risk bands. Gene-expression fields are optional (default 0).

provenance.notes: PGREM: score=age(≤29=3/30-49=2/50-64=1/≥65=0)+temporal(1.5)+preopGRE(1)+Σ[coef·EXP(gene)]; 2-yr risk lookup <2→~0%…<14→~95%. Gene coefs: LUZP2 .000647, GPNMB .002348, MMD2 .003071, GALNT13 .005717, IKBKGP1 .014818, SLC1A4 .019691, RP1 .019902. Verify vs paper.
